transactions.description: RHP Jordan Geber assigned to Binghamton Rumble Ponies from Syracuse Mets.
Rochester Red Wings released 1B Matt Mervis.
RHP Jordan Geber assigned to Syracuse Mets from Binghamton Rumble Ponies.
Philadelphia Phillies sent C Garrett Stubbs outright to Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
OF Cole Carrigg assigned to Albuquerque Isotopes from Hartford Yard Goats.
